records.title: Archive and taxonomy foundation consolidated
records.summary: The repo foundation, schemas, proposal archive and publishing pipeline were consolidated as the practical continuation of proposal 111.
records.notes: Editorial milestone seeded from the repository bootstrap.

records.title: Data foundation and proposal archive published
records.summary: Proposal archive, transaction decoding, tagging queue and public Pages publishing are live under gnars-data.
records.notes: Editorial milestone for the current operations workstream.

records.title: Gnars Camp analytics layer scoped
records.summary: People, treasury, workstream and proposal analytics were specified to reshape the site from download-first to DAO-analytics-first.
records.notes: Keeps the workstream page from being a budget-only view.

records.title: Unified people and spend views connected to governance
records.summary: People directory, recipient rankings and budget-vs-spend rollups are being connected to current workstream outputs.
records.notes: Seeded milestone for the analytics-first site implementation.
